title: Southeast Asia Aid Map
gist: Lowy's Southeast Asia Aid Map tracks US$290 billion across 130,000 development-finance projects (2015–2023) and warns that a wave of impending aid cuts is set to hit the region hard, putting its poorest countries most at risk.

insights.claim: The Southeast Asia Aid Map tracks US$290 billion in aid and development finance across 130,000 projects from 2015–2023, described as the most comprehensive regional aid dataset of its kind.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: A granular donor/recipient dataset useful for mapping who funds what across Southeast Asia.
insights.locator: The Southeast Asia Aid Map data interactive

insights.claim: Lowy's 2025 Southeast Asia Aid Report warns that a wave of impending aid cuts is set to hit the region hard, leaving its development trajectory at an uncertain moment.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: Falling development finance is a macro headwind for frontier Southeast Asian economies — watch donor budgets.
insights.locator: A wave of impending aid cuts is set to hit the region hard

insights.claim: Impending aid cuts put Southeast Asia's poorest countries most at risk, according to Lowy analysis.
insights.speaker: Lowy Institute — The Interpreter
insights.so_what: Concentrated downside for the lowest-income recipients — a targeted fiscal and stability risk.
insights.locator: Alexandre Dayant: Aid cuts put Southeast Asia's poorest
